response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned generalist engineer with nearly two decades of full-stack, backend, and low-latency systems experience, strong TypeScript/Node skills, and recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and the resume shows only about a year of GenAI-adjacent work with no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or AI systems on major cloud platforms. Strong teaching and workshop experience suggests customer-facing potential, but the core AI depth expected at Staff forward-deployed level is not demonstrated.
strengths: 18+ years of broad production engineering experience across web, backend, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience directly relevant to the role's key technologies
Proven mentorship and communication skills through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of GenAI exposure)
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation, or observability for AI systems
Limited evidence of designing AI systems on major cloud platforms (only AWS CDK in a non-AI context)
